metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced skills in multimedia production, including game development, interactive design, animation, and emerging technologies like VR/AR. This course emphasizes creative expression, technical proficiency, and professional media development practices.
metadata.general_description: Advanced multimedia production, game development, interactive design, VR/AR, and portfolio development.

big_ideas.statement: Digital media combines storytelling, visual design, technology, and interactivity to engage audiences
big_ideas.elaboration: Effective digital media integrates narrative, aesthetics, user experience, and technical implementation.

big_ideas.statement: Interactive media and games create immersive experiences through user choice, feedback, and engagement
big_ideas.elaboration: Game and interactive design require understanding player psychology, mechanics, and meaningful interaction design.

big_ideas.statement: Emerging technologies like VR and AR create new possibilities for storytelling and human-computer interaction
big_ideas.elaboration: New immersive technologies offer unique opportunities for creative expression and user engagement.

big_ideas.statement: Professional digital media production requires planning, collaboration, technical skill, and creative vision
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful media projects integrate project management, artistic direction, technical implementation, and team coordination.

competencies.raw: Design interactive experiences and user interfaces
i_can_statements: I can plan user journeys and interactions
I can design intuitive interfaces and navigation
I can create wireframes and prototypes
I can design for accessibility and user experience

competencies.raw: Design games with engaging mechanics and narratives
i_can_statements: I can design game mechanics and systems
I can develop compelling narratives and characters
I can create level designs and challenges
I can balance gameplay difficulty and pacing

competencies.raw: Design multimedia projects combining audio, video, and animation
i_can_statements: I can plan multimedia projects conceptually
I can design visual composition and cinematography
I can plan audio design and music integration
I can create animation sequences
I can design 3D environments and interactions
I can design immersive narratives
I can plan spatial interaction design
I can design for emerging platform constraints

competencies.raw: Apply multimedia production skills across media types
i_can_statements: I can produce high-quality audio content
I can film and edit video professionally
I can create 2D and 3D animation
I can composite and integrate media elements

competencies.raw: Apply game development and programming skills
i_can_statements: I can use game engines effectively
I can implement game mechanics and systems
I can code interactive behaviors
I can optimize game performance
I can create interactive web experiences
I can implement responsive design
I can code interactive features and animations
I can optimize interactive performance

competencies.raw: Apply project management and collaboration skills
i_can_statements: I can plan and manage digital media projects
I can collaborate with team members
I can iterate and receive feedback
I can deliver professional quality work

competencies.raw: Use digital media production software and tools
i_can_statements: I can use audio production and editing software
I can use video production and editing software
I can use 2D and 3D graphics software
I can use compositing and effects software

competencies.raw: Use game engines and development frameworks
i_can_statements: I can use popular game engines
I can integrate assets and systems
I can use physics and animation tools
I can use debugging and profiling tools

competencies.raw: Use web and interactive development technologies
i_can_statements: I can use web development frameworks
I can use interactive libraries and tools
I can optimize for web performance
I can deploy to web platforms

competencies.raw: Use VR/AR development tools and platforms
i_can_statements: I can use VR development frameworks
I can use AR tools and platforms
I can implement spatial interactions
I can deploy to VR/AR devices
